data.title: Impartner introduces Aimi, an AI engine to boost partner revenue. Offers 3 core capabilities.
data.description: Impartner, a renowned leader in partner management and partner marketing automation, has unveiled Aimi (Artificial Impartner Intelligence), an advanced AI engine integrated into their platform. Aimi aims to enhance partner productivity and fortify the operational base that bolsters enterprise partner revenue activities. This new release caters to essential market demands and provides three key features: intelligent content creation, streamlined recruitment, and personalized analytics. With Aimi's introduction, Impartner gears to optimize partner interactions and empower businesses with cutting-edge AI capabilities.

data.title: Investment alert: Losses in SFM urged to contact Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check law firm for securities class action.
data.description: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on December 11, 2025, it was announced that the law firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP revealed a securities class action lawsuit filed against Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. The lawsuit, on behalf of individuals who bought or had other involvement with Sprouts, particularly targets the company's actions. Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc., listed as SFM on the NASDAQ, is amidst the lawsuit. For more details, interested parties can visit www.ktmc.com.

data.title: Rostrum Pacific gets $150M funding from Crayhill Capital Management to boost music catalog growth strategy.
data.description: In Los Angeles on December 11, 2025, Rostrum Pacific, an independent full-service music company, revealed that it had successfully obtained $150 million in funding from Crayhill Capital Management, a notable asset-based investment firm with $2.9 billion in assets under management. This investment will support Rostrum in its future endeavors and growth strategies.

data.title: Texas grid faces unprecedented demand from AI data centers surpassing Bitcoin miners, causing record surge in large-load requests per ERCOT.
data.description: ERCOT has announced a significant increase in large-load requests, reaching record numbers. The surge is particularly notable in AI data centers, which have exceeded Bitcoin miners. This trend is causing a shift in Texas's grid planning and reliability expectations. The numbers indicate a substantial impact on the state's energy infrastructure.

data.title: Disney to invest $1 billion in OpenAI for new licensing deal with Sora, ChatGPT.
data.description: OpenAI has sealed a new licensing deal involving Disney characters, alongside popular AI models like Sora and ChatGPT. The Dow Jones company is planning to invest a significant amount of $1 billion in OpenAI, signaling a major partnership in the tech industry. This agreement marks a noteworthy collaboration between entertainment giant Disney and the cutting-edge AI firm OpenAI.

data.title: RH (NYSE: RH) to report Q3 earnings on Dec. 11. Expected earnings: $2.16/share (down from $2.48/share), revenue: $883.65M ($811.73M last year). RH shares closed at $157.22.
data.description: Luxury home furnishings retailer RH will announce its third-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, Dec. 11. Analysts predict earnings to be $2.16 per share, a decrease from $2.48 per share last year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be $883.65 million, up from $811.73 million in the same period the previous year, according to data from Benzinga Pro. Following disappointing second-quarter results announced on Sept. 11, RH's shares declined by 0.5% to $157.22 at the close on Wednesday. For further insights, readers can refer to Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page for the latest analyst ratings.

data.title: Wealth Write.Up, Canadian AI software leader, earns SOC 2 Type 1 certification for data security. Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: Montreal, December 11, 2025 - Wealth Write.Up, a prominent Canadian company specializing in AI-driven investment accounting software, revealed today the successful completion of its SOC 2 Type 1 certification. This certification confirms that Wealth Write.Up adheres to the top data security and privacy standards. This accomplishment solidifies the company's commitment to providing clients with secure and reliable solutions.

data.title: UCO leading 30+ markets in 2025, empowering real estate pros with trust, education, innovation globally.
data.description: In a press release dated December 11, 2025, based in Altamonte Springs, Florida, Universal Consulting Opportunities (UCO), under Stellar MLS, is leading more than 30 markets to showcase the impact of trust, education, and innovation in equipping real estate professionals globally.

data.title: 20-year-old lottery winner declined $1 million, chose $1,000/week for life. Expert predicts payout could exceed $1 million. Binance founder criticizes choice for short-term comfort over "generational upside."
data.description: A lottery winner made headlines by opting for $1,000 weekly for life over a $1 million lump sum, sparking a debate in the financial world. The winner, a 20-year-old named Brenda, believed the steady income provided more security and longevity. Financial analysts pointed out that over 30 years, the weekly payouts could total around $1.56 million, exceeding the initial lump sum offer. This decision led to divided opinions, with some praising the stability of fixed income and others critiquing the missed opportunity for investing a large sum at a young age. Binance founder Changpeng Zhao weighed in, stating that choosing weekly payouts sacrifices long-term potential for immediate comfort. The news story grabbed attention for highlighting the trade-off between short-term security and potential growth in investments, stimulating a fierce financial discussion.

data.title: Abich Financial Wealth Management named one of Financial Planning's top 50 RIAs to work at, ranked no. 37.
data.description: Abich Financial Wealth Management, based in ASHBURN, Va., was recently named as the 37th best Registered Investment Advisor (RIA) to work for in 2025 by Financial Planning. This ranking was the result of a collaboration between Financial Planning and Best Companies Group, aiming to recognize organizations that prioritize employee well-being and foster a positive work environment. This accolade highlights Abich Financial Wealth Management's commitment to providing a top-notch workplace for its staff members.

data.title: RiverMeadow, in Los Gatos, presents new cloud migration tools with advanced capabilities, promising automated workload mobility.
data.description: In Los Gatos, California on December 11, 2025, RiverMeadow Software revealed a major enhancement to its offerings. The company, known for its expertise in workload mobility and modernization automation, introduced a comprehensive suite of advanced discovery and assessment features. This expansion aims to provide users with a fully integrated platform to better facilitate their needs.

data.title: Truth Initiative partners with Celebration Bowl to raise awareness of tobacco's impact on Black communities, providing cessation resources.
data.description: In Washington on December 11, 2025, Truth Initiative, the leading nonprofit public health organization in the country, announced an activation focused on promoting health equity and increasing availability of effective smoking cessation tools. This initiative aims to reach a large audience and provide vital resources. Truth Initiative's commitment to eradicating nicotine use is stronger than ever, with significant efforts being made in this direction.

data.title: iCIMS December Workforce Report shows late-year hiring strategies being adjusted across global markets.
data.description: iCIMS' December Workforce Report for 2025 provides detailed insights into labor market activities and job trends in the United States and Europe, the Middle East, and Africa (EMEA) regions. The report, released by iCIMS, a prominent talent acquisition technology provider, offers comprehensive analysis of job popularity and workforce trends. This year-end report covers key statistics and data on job demand and activity in the mentioned regions.
